title: AEROMODELLING CLUB
shortDesc: Focuses on aircraft design, drone technology, and aeronautical engineering.
longDesc: The Aeromodelling Club is a hub for aviation enthusiasts passionate about aircraft design, drone technology, UAV systems, and aeronautical engineering. The club encourages students to learn practical skills in model aircraft building, flight simulation, robotics integration, and aerospace innovation through workshops, competitions, and hands-on projects.

title: AEROX CLUB
shortDesc: Focuses on aeronautics, aircraft technologies, and aerospace innovations.
longDesc: The AEROX CLUB is a premier student organization at Chandigarh University dedicated to the advancement of aeronautics and drone technology. The club provides a platform for aspiring engineers to engage in hands-on projects, workshops, and research in drone technologies, avionics and aircraft technologies. From assembling and piloting drones to participating in national competitions, AEROX CLUB fosters innovation and technical excellence in the aerospace domain.

title: ASCENTIA CLUB
shortDesc: A personality and leadership development club for aspiring business professionals.
longDesc: Where Words Find Wings! Step into a lively space that satisfies your all literary desires and unleashes the power of words. We give wings to creative and bold ideas, through poetry, storytelling, debates and public speaking. Doesn't matter if you're just starting out or are seasoned, every voice counts in our welcoming community. From workshops, open mics, contests, and many public speaking events; we encourage creativity while inspiring collaboration. If diving into a good book is your idea of bliss, you'll feel right at home in Bibliosmia, our lively community of book lovers. At Ascentia, friendships flourish, words become bridges and you are free to be who you really are. Come, join us and be part of a world, where even sky is not the limit and stories come to life.

title: ASTRONAUTICS CLUB
shortDesc: Dedicated to astronautics, space missions, rocket science, and advanced aerospace exploration.
longDesc: Astronautics Club is the official college-level technical club dedicated to space technology, rocketry, and satellite systems. The club focuses on hands-on learning, propulsion systems, CubeSat development, mission design, and space research fundamentals. Through workshops, technical sessions, rocket design projects, satellite simulations, and research-driven activities, the club aims to build strong foundations in orbital mechanics, launch vehicle systems, avionics for space applications, structural design, and space mission planning.

title: ASTRONOMY CLUB
shortDesc: A club for students passionate about space science, celestial observations, astrophysics, and astronomy-related activities.
longDesc: Welcome to the Astronomy Club, a vibrant and enthusiastic community driven by the passion of Chandigarh University students! Join us as we explore the wonders of the universe, share knowledge, and ignite our curiosity about the cosmos together. Here, we learn, teach, and explore, diversifying the frontiers of our imagination and turning them into reality while forming new concepts. This includes exploration, discoveries, research, analysis, as well as fun and games.

title: BIOSPHERE CLUB
category: Social Impact & Community Development & Community Development
shortDesc: Dedicated to environmental conservation, climate action, and sustainable development.
longDesc: The Biosphere Club is dedicated to creating awareness about environmental conservation, climate action, and sustainable development. Through plantation drives, cleanliness campaigns, eco-projects, sustainability workshops, and awareness programs, the club inspires students to contribute towards building a greener and healthier planet.

title: BIZLYTICS CLUB
shortDesc: A business analytics and data insights club combining technology with strategic decision-making.
longDesc: A student society, student association, university society, student club, university club, or student organization is a society or an organization, operated by students at a university, college, or other educational institution, whose membership typically consists only of students

title: BROKEN CONSOLE CLUB
shortDesc: Dedicated to game design, development, animation, and interactive entertainment technologies.
longDesc: Broken Console is a dynamic and innovative tech club that brings together enthusiasts passionate about gaming, technology, and creative problem-solving. Our mission is to explore the realms of game development, software innovation, and tech projects that push the boundaries of imagination.

title: C SQUARE CLUB
shortDesc: A collaborative coding and computing community promoting technical excellence and innovation.
longDesc: At C Square, we don’t romanticize coding — we live it. Late-night debugging sessions, caffeine-powered hackathons, LeetCode streaks hanging by a thread, and "works on my machine" moments are all part of the culture. Recognized as the Best Club for two consecutive years at Chandigarh University, C Square thrives on DSA battles, Competitive Programming, Open Source contributions, and real-world development. We turn curious coders into builders who can survive both contests and production servers. We bring the community, the chaos, and the Duty Leave — you bring the grind.

title: CAMPUS-TO-CORPORATE CLUB
shortDesc: Helps students prepare for corporate life through soft skills, aptitude, and interview training.
longDesc: The Campus to Corporate (C2C) Club at Chandigarh University is designed to equip students from the very first year with the skills, mindset, and awareness needed to thrive in the corporate world. Our goal is to help students understand what companies actually expect, bridge the academic-industry gap, and provide hands-on exposure through soft skills sessions, company-specific training, resume and LinkedIn building, mock interviews, and more  well before they enter placement years.

title: CLOUDSTACK CLUB
shortDesc: Focuses on cloud computing, DevOps, virtualization, and modern infrastructure technologies.
longDesc: A student society, student association, university society, student club, university club, or student organization is a society or an organization, operated by students at a university, college, or other educational institution, whose membership typically consists only of students

title: COGNIX CLUB
shortDesc: Explores cognitive computing, AI applications, and intelligent systems development.
longDesc: Cognix Club is dedicated to exploring the frontiers of cognitive computing, artificial intelligence, and intelligent system development. Through workshops, hackathons, and collaborative projects, students gain hands-on experience in building AI-powered solutions.

title: CU PLAYNATION CLUB
shortDesc: A gaming and e-sports community organizing tournaments and interactive gaming events.
longDesc: PlayNation is Chandigarh University’s official Esports and Gaming Club, built for students who live and breathe competitive gaming. From high-stakes tournaments and LAN battles to inter-college leagues and campus showdowns, PlayNation is where strategy, skill, and teamwork come to life. More than just a club - it’s a platform to grow as players, leaders, and future professionals in the ever-evolving world of Esports.

title: CYSECSPHERE CLUB
shortDesc: A cybersecurity-focused club promoting ethical hacking, digital safety, and cyber awareness.
longDesc: Welcome to Cysecsphere Club CU - Chandigarh University's Core Cybersecurity Community. We're a student-led initiative exploring the frontlines of cybersecurity through hands-on CTFs, workshops, research, and red vs. blue team activities. Whether you're into ethical hacking, cryptography, or threat intel, this is where curiosity meets real-world skill-building.

title: DROIDLINX CLUB
shortDesc: Dedicated to Android development, mobile app innovation, and smart device technologies.
longDesc: DroidLinx Club is a hub for mobile technology enthusiasts focused on Android development, cross-platform app building, and smart device innovation. Members collaborate on real-world projects, participate in app development challenges, and stay ahead in mobile technology trends.

title: ECO GENESIS CLUB
category: Social Impact & Community Development & Community Development
shortDesc: Promotes environmental sustainability, eco-friendly practices, and green innovation initiatives.
longDesc: The Eco Genesis Club aims to merge environment and technology to promote sustainable, eco-friendly practices on campus and beyond. It seeks to foster environmental awareness among students by integrating innovation with conservation in activities like tree plantations, cleanups, recycling drives, workshops, and techenabled green projects.

title: ENTREPRENEURSHIP CLUB
shortDesc: Encourages startup culture, business innovation, and entrepreneurial mindset development.
longDesc: A student society, student association, university society, student club, university club, or student organization is a society or an organization, operated by students at a university, college, or other educational institution, whose membership typically consists only of students

title: FINVERSE CLUB
shortDesc: Dedicated to finance, investment strategies, stock markets, and business analytics learning.
longDesc: Finverse Club is Chandigarh University's official student led financial club under the department of MBA in Banking & Financial Engineering. Our mission is simple: Make finance practical, exciting, and real for students. Whether you are passionate about the stock market, curious about how banks operate, or want to explore financial technology, Finverse gives you the platform to learn, build skills, and connect with industry leaders.

title: FPF CLUB
categories: Social Impact & Community Development Tech Projects
shortDesc: A technical club focused on programming fundamentals, coding practices, and project development.
longDesc: Future Prep Forum (FPF) is a student-led club dedicated to preparing students for the future of work. We focus on building industry-relevant technical skills, offering accessible certifications, and driving innovation through hands-on hackathons and workshops.By bridging academia and industry, FPF creates meaningful opportunities for learning, collaboration, and career growthempowering students to thrive in an ever-evolving professional landscape.

title: HOTEL MANAGEMENT CLUB
shortDesc: Explores the world of hospitality, tourism, food service, and event management.
longDesc: The Hotel Management Club provides students with opportunities to explore the dynamic world of hospitality, tourism, food service, and event management. The club organizes culinary activities, hospitality workshops, tourism awareness programs, and industry interaction sessions to enhance professional skills and leadership in the hospitality sector.

title: IGNITE YOUTH CLUB
category: Social Impact & Community Development & Community Development
shortDesc: Motivates students through leadership, creativity, innovation, and youth empowerment activities.
longDesc: Ignite Club is a dynamic student-led initiative dedicated to promoting Indian Knowledge Systems (IKS) and nurturing leadership rooted in cultural wisdom and social responsibility. The club provides a platform for intellectual discussions, creative activities, community engagement, and value-based learning inspired by India’s rich heritage. Through workshops, dialogues, heritage activities, and collaborative projects, Ignite Club encourages students to develop critical thinking, ethical leadership, and a deeper connection with indigenous knowledge traditions.

title: MARKETING BRIGADE CLUB
shortDesc: Helps students develop branding, digital marketing, and business promotion skills.
longDesc: Marketing Brigade is Chandigarh University's official club under the department of MBA- Digital marketing, dedicated to empowering students with hands-on knowledge and experience in the fields of marketing, branding, and digital communication.Our mission is to foster awareness and skill-building in marketing and branding through dynamic initiatives such as workshops, branding booths, influencer-led events, competitions, and full-scale social media campaigns. A full fledged ecosystem dedicated to mastering every vertical of digital marketing.

title: NANOVERSE CLUB
shortDesc: Focuses on nanotechnology, quantum computing, and scientific innovation.
longDesc: The Nanoverse Club is a futuristic technology community focused on emerging fields such as nanotechnology, quantum computing, advanced materials, and scientific innovation. The club promotes research discussions, technical workshops, innovation challenges, and collaborative projects that help students explore next-generation technologies shaping the future.

title: NEXASOUL CLUB
shortDesc: A frontend development club focused on building industry-ready engineers through real-world projects and modern web technologies.
longDesc: NexaSoul is a frontend development club focused on building industry-ready engineers through real-world projects, hackathons, UI/UX innovation, live deployments, collaborative workflows, and modern web technologies aligned with industry standards.

title: PROTOSTART CLUB
shortDesc: Supports prototype development, startup ideation, and innovative tech solutions.
longDesc: ProtoStart Club is the heartbeat of innovation at Chandigarh University  a launchpad where raw ideas turn into real startups. Through mentorship, workshops, and high-energy competitions, it fuels creativity, leadership, and an unshakable entrepreneurial spirit, empowering students to rise as tomorrows changemakers.

title: RAMANUJAN CLUB
shortDesc: A mathematics-focused club promoting problem-solving, analytical thinking, and logical reasoning.
longDesc: The Ramanujan Club is a mathematics club that aims to make mathematics fun, interesting, and interactive rather than boring and limited to classrooms. We organize activities like math quizzes, puzzle solving sessions, treasure hunts, workshops, competitions, and interactive events that show the fun and creative side of mathematics. Our goal is to develop logical thinking, problem solving skills, and curiosity among students. Anyone can join the club  you do not have to be a mathematics expert. If you enjoy puzzles, games, challenges, or want to explore mathematics in a fun way beyond the textbooks.

title: ROBOX CLUB
shortDesc: Focuses on robotics engineering, hardware prototyping, and automation projects.
longDesc: Are you ready to embark on an exciting journey into the future of technology? RoboClubChandigarh University is the perfect place for curious minds and tech enthusiasts tounite, innovate, and create. Whether you're a seasoned programmer, a mechanicalgenius, or just starting to explore the world of robotics, you'll find a supportivecommunity here. We dive into the latest advancements, work on cutting-edge projects,and turn imaginative ideas into reality. Join us, and let's build the future together, onerobot at a time!Vision Statement:To be a leading community that fosters innovation, collaboration, and excellence inrobotics. We aim to inspire and equip our members with the skills and knowledge todrive technological advancements and positively impact society. We want every clubmember to have a project in their resume that stands out to the masses.Mission Statement: Cutting-edge innovation through AI + Robotics. Engage in a wide spectrum of cutting-edge projects unique as per everyonesneed and resume. Reverse learning and Holistic development. Add on- Train and stimulate for Patent publishing.

title: SCI-FI INNOVATION CLUB
shortDesc: Encourages futuristic thinking, innovation, and science-fiction-inspired technology ideas.
longDesc: The Sci-Fi Innovation Club at Chandigarh University fosters creativity, critical thinking, and innovation through a blend of technical, literary, and leadership activities. It serves as a vibrant platform for students to explore futuristic ideas, intellectual property rights, and collaborative development.

title: SOCRATIC-CIRCLE CLUB
shortDesc: Encourages philosophical discussions, debates, critical thinking, and intellectual conversations.
longDesc: We are the Socratic Circle Club, under the department of Liberal Arts and Humanities. Words can change the world,  that's what we believe in. To make it true, we are providing a platform to the students, so that, their views can be heard by all. Sharing of knowledge and views, with each other, is the best way to converse, understand and reach a solution to any and every problem faced by us, collectively, there are quite a lot of them in recent times, which makes it all the more necessary for us to band together.One man's word is very powerful already, imagine the strength of the collective.

title: TECH TATVA CLUB
shortDesc: A technology-driven club organizing coding events, workshops, and technical competitions.
longDesc: "Rooted in KnowledgeRising with Technology" TechTatva is a university-level club dedicated to upskilling students in disruptive technologies while drawing wisdom from India’s knowledge systems including logic, design, governance, and environmental wisdom. We aim to foster innovation, real-world problem solving, and a collaborative spirit across departments, empowering students to improve everyday life through the power of technology.Learn more about TechTatva at: https://www.techtatva.club/Incubate your project at: https://www.techtatva.club/projects

title: THE VOYAGE CLUB
category: Social Impact & Community Development & Community Development
shortDesc: Encourages exploration, teamwork, adventure activities, and experiential learning.
longDesc: The Voyage Club is committed to shaping youth who carry the strength of Indias culture and the vision of modern governance. Through participation in the National Youth Parliament in National Level, along with debates and declamation competitions, our members will not just speakthey will think, challenge ideas, and design solutions rooted in values yet ready for the future. This is where our mission meets action: empowering students to become not just voices in a hall, but architects of a Viksit Bharat 2047.

title: TOKENTITAN CLUB
shortDesc: Focuses on blockchain technology, cryptocurrency, Web3 development, and decentralized applications.
longDesc: TokenTitan Club is a student-led community focused on blockchain technology, cryptocurrency ecosystems, Web3 development, and decentralized applications. The club organizes workshops, hackathons, and seminars to educate and empower students in the rapidly evolving world of distributed ledger technology.

title: TOURISM CLUB
shortDesc: Promotes tourism awareness, cultural exchange, and sustainable travel education.
longDesc: The Tourism Club at Chandigarh University is dedicated to promoting tourism awareness, cultural exchange, and sustainable travel practices among students. Through field visits, seminars, and cultural events, the club fosters a deeper understanding of diverse cultures and the tourism industry.

title: VIKSIT VELOCITY CLUB
shortDesc: Viksit Velocity Club is a dynamic student community under the Mechanical domain, focused on innovation, motorsports engineering, and participation in Formula Bharat.
longDesc: Viksit Velocity Club is a dynamic student community under the Mechanical domain, focused on innovation, motorsports engineering, and participation in Formula Bharat. The club empowers students to design, develop, and optimize high-performance formula-style race cars while enhancing practical engineering and teamwork skills.

title: VIRTUONIX CLUB
shortDesc: Dedicated to Augmented Reality and Virtual Reality technologies and immersive experiences.
longDesc: Welcome to the AR/VR Club!  A hub for curious minds and tech lovers exploring Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Virtual & Augmented Reality.  Here, creativity meets technologywhether its building immersive VR worlds, experimenting with AI, or sparking bold new ideas.  Join us to learn, create, and innovate together!

title: YOUNG ORATORS CLUB
shortDesc: Develops public speaking, debating, communication, and presentation skills among students.
longDesc: The Young Orators Club is a vibrant and inclusive platform dedicated to the overall personality development of individuals. Our mission is to enhance communication, leadership, and persuasive skills through dynamic, real-world activities and engaging formats.We strongly believe that effective communication is the cornerstone of success in any field.
